# polymarket_price (Data Source)

Reads the best available CLOB price for an outcome token on a given side (`buy` or `sell`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_price" "buy" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
  side     = "buy"
}

output "best_buy_price" { value = data.polymarket_price.buy.price }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `side` (String) Side to quote: `buy` returns the best ask (lowest sell price); `sell` returns the best bid (highest buy price).
- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to quote. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute.

### Read-Only

- `price` (String) Best price for the requested side, in `[0, 1]`, as a decimal string.
